## Checklist

- [ ] All tests pass locally (`R CMD CHECK --as-cran` and/or `testthat`) with zero ERRORs and zero WARNINGs
- [ ] Codebook updated (`datasets.csv` and `variables.csv`) if the schema changed — or N/A
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under the correct Added / Changed / Fixed category
- [ ] CC-BY-SA 4.0 attribution to Joshua C. Fjelstul, Ph.D. is maintained, and modifications relative to the original are documented
- [ ] Change stays within the R package's 29-table core (no ratings, weather, or forecasting content)

## For data corrections only

- [ ] A Wikipedia source URL supporting the correction is cited in the commit message
